description_long: This object is a long, straight-bladed sword with a minimalist, modern design. The blade is narrow, flat, and appears to be made of a dark, metallic material, extending seamlessly from the guard to a pointed tip. The crossguard is simple and perpendicular to the blade, providing basic hand protection. The handle is cylindrical and ends in a spiral or corkscrew-like pommel, which is visually distinctive and may serve as a counterweight or decorative feature. The entire object is monochromatic, with a matte black finish that gives it a sleek, utilitarian appearance. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or decorative patterns on the blade, guard, or handle.
description: A long, straight, matte black sword with a simple crossguard and a spiral pommel, featuring a sleek, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight blade, crossguard, and spiral pommel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow blade profile and the symmetrical crossguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the straight blade and spiral pommel details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the handle and spiral pommel, with the blade appearing as a thin line.
attribute_handle_design: straight cylindrical handle with a spiral pommel, matte finish
